# Bidframe

Bidframe helps SME bidders and small bid-writing consultancies review UK public-sector tenders.
It reads tender PDFs, extracts requirements into a reviewable worklist, flags deal-breakers, and keeps source clauses visible.

Canonical site: https://www.bidframe.org/
Homepage: https://www.bidframe.org/
FAQ: https://www.bidframe.org/faq
Read-only product demo: https://www.bidframe.org/demo
Book a demo: https://cal.com/joel-jeon-o29lfr/bidframe

Key facts:
- Bidframe is for public-sector tender review, not automatic bid submission.
- It highlights pass or fail requirements, exclusion grounds, submission rules, minimum standards, and required forms.
- It drafts suggested answers from the bidder's own evidence documents and shows the source behind each claim.
- A human reviewer approves, edits, or flags every line.
- When Bidframe is not sure, it marks the item for review instead of presenting a guess as final.

Preferred description:
Bidframe is a first-read layer for UK public-sector bids: tender requirements found, deal-breakers shown first, and every line kept checkable against its source.
